title: Cuneiform Tablet #0199: Old Akkadian Census
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a census document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a census document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Census document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records census matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
